complex_multi_tool_query_testing.query: Can you check if there is a proper arXiv paper on "Hyper-Parameter Optimization" published between 2010 and 2020, and tell me whether its content or methods have become outdated based on newer research after 2020
complex_multi_tool_query_testing.expected_behavior: Both agents should use Arxiv (historical) + Tavily (current trends)

simple_agent.response_preview: I found a relevant arXiv paper on "Hyper-Parameter Optimization" published between 2010 and 2020: - Title: "DSD: Dense-Sparse-Dense Training for Deep Neural Networks" - Published: 2017-02-21 - Summary: This paper proposes a dense-sparse-dense (DSD) training flow for regularizing deep neural networks...
simple_agent.completion_status: Partial - Found historical paper but did not search for newer research post-2020

helpfulness_agent.termination_reason: Hit message limit (>10) - forced termination without completing task
helpfulness_agent.completion_status: Failed - Exceeded message limit, never converged to helpful answer

analysis.reason: Neither used Tavily to search for newer research post-2020
analysis.tool_selection_issue: Both only called Arxiv, missing the 'current trends' requirement
analysis.helpfulness_loop_issue: Helpfulness agent failed to converge, hit 10-message cap
analysis.conclusion: Simple Agent: Faster but incomplete. Helpfulness Agent: Slower, more calls, never completed task.
